subject: Swift detection of IGR J17497-2821 (trigger 230504)
body:
A. M. Parsons (GSFC), S. D. Barthelmy (GSFC), C. Gronwall (PSU),
C. Guidorzi (Univ Bicocca&INAF-OAB), H. A. Krimm (GSFC/USRA),
C. B. Markwardt (GSFC/UMD), K. L. Page (U Leicester),
D. M. Palmer (LANL) and M. Perri (ASDC) report on behalf of the Swift
Team:

At 06:24:46 UT, the Swift Burst Alert Telescope (BAT) triggered and
located a point source (trigger=230504). Swift slewed immediately to
the position. The BAT on-board calculated location is  RA,Dec
267.402, -28.340 {17h 49m 36s, -28d 20' 21"} (J2000) with an
uncertainty of 3 arcmin (radius, 90% containment, including 
systematic uncertainty). We note that this is the INTEGRAL source IGR
J17497-2821 and not a GRB.
